data.body: PROMPT-ENG note (clean re-log; prior entry had backticks eaten by the shell). Reason-first contract added: a leading required analysis field on submit_review/emit_findings/verify_finding so the model reasons before emitting verdicts/attributes (fix for the Let-Me-Speak-Freely forced-tool-call anti-pattern). Affirmative anti-FP framing + verbosity-bias guard added to SYSTEM/PASS1/PASS2. Per-criterion role/company personas deliberately NOT added (research: no rigor gain, often hurts). Committed b324932c. Full research-backed do/dont + citations live in epic 6f2d WS-DOC.
